name: GitLab
description: GitLab is a web-based DevOps platform providing Git repository hosting, CI/CD pipelines, and integrated tooling for the software development lifecycle.

years.notes: Original detailed tanuki face mark by Dmitriy Zaporozhets — line-art illustration in #231F20 (near-black), no orange. Sourced from the initial 2014-03-05 commit of gitlab-com/gitlab-artwork; Inkscape metadata stripped, transforms preserved and wrapped in a 24x24 viewBox scale group (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).

Geometric tanuki redesign introduced May 2015 — abstract three-tone triangular composition replacing the 2014 illustrated face mark. Sourced from gitlab-com/gitlab-artwork commit 880662ad (2015-07-08); Sketch metadata stripped, transforms wrapped in a 24x24 viewBox scale group (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).
Tanuki refresh — <g transform> wrapper retained (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform). Scale + translate fitted to actual path bbox so the mark fills the 24x24 viewBox in line with 2014/2015.
